executives.name: Matthew J. Murphy
executives.background: Mr. Murphy has served as our President and Chief Executive Officer since July 2016 and as a director since July 2016. He was appointed Chairman of the Board in June 2021. Prior to joining Marvell, Mr. Murphy worked at Maxim Integrated, where he held several executive roles, including Executive Vice President, Business Units, Sales and Marketing.

executives.name: Willem A. Meintjes
executives.background: Mr. Meintjes has served as our Chief Financial Officer since January 2023. He previously served as our Chief Accounting Officer from June 2016 to January 2023 and as our Treasurer from March 2018 to January 2023. Before joining Marvell, he was Vice President and Corporate Controller at Newport Corporation.

executives.name: Dr. Loi Nguyen
executives.background: Dr. Nguyen has served as our Executive Vice President, Optical and Copper Connectivity Group since April 2021. He co-founded Inphi Corporation and served as its Senior Vice President, Optical Interconnect from 2000 until its acquisition by Marvell in 2021.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President, Optical and Copper Connectivity Group

executives.name: Chris Koopmans
executives.background: Mr. Koopmans has served as our Chief Operations Officer since January 2023. He previously served as Executive Vice President, Marketing and Business Operations from 2020 to 2023 and as Executive Vice President, Networking and Processors from 2016 to 2020.

executives.name: Mitchell Gaynor
executives.background: Mr. Gaynor has served as our Chief Administration Officer since January 2023. He previously served as our Chief Legal Officer and Secretary from 2016 to 2023. Prior to Marvell, he was Executive Vice President and General Counsel at Juniper Networks.

board_of_directors.name: Matthew J. Murphy
board_of_directors.background: President and CEO of Marvell. Chairman of the Board since 2021.

board_of_directors.name: Ford Tamer
board_of_directors.background: Former President and CEO of Inphi Corporation. Previously CEO of Telegent Systems and Senior Vice President at Broadcom.

board_of_directors.name: Sara Andrews
board_of_directors.background: Chief Information Security Officer at Experian. Former CISO at PepsiCo and Unit 42 at Palo Alto Networks.

board_of_directors.name: Brad Buss
board_of_directors.background: Former CFO of SolarCity and Cypress Semiconductor. Director at Tesla and Advance Auto Parts.

board_of_directors.name: Edward Frank
board_of_directors.background: Co-founder of Cloud Parity. Former Vice President of Macintosh Hardware Systems Engineering at Apple.

board_of_directors.name: Richard Hill
board_of_directors.background: Former Chairman and CEO of Novellus Systems. Former Chairman of Marvell (2016-2021).

board_of_directors.name: Rebecca House
board_of_directors.background: Senior Vice President, Chief People and Legal Officer at Rockwell Automation.

board_of_directors.name: Michael Strachan
board_of_directors.background: Former Partner at Ernst & Young LLP.

board_of_directors.name: Robert Switz
board_of_directors.background: Former Chairman, President and CEO of ADC Telecommunications.

sources.source_description: Marvell Technology, Inc. Definitive Proxy Statement (DEF 14A)
